description: Deterministic Ha-Pri v3 Core signing payload vectors. v3 extends v2 with verdict_id + decision, binding the verdict itself to the signed bytes. These prove stable field order, header distinction, and that both new fields are covered by the payload. The HMAC is performed by the Worker; Core produces only the payload string.

input.rawContent:
Canonical test content for FreshContext.
Second line with evidence.
